author: y4rr
content: Result: Delivered. Pin script + verify harness + rust dump example + cargo test wrapper. Pinned to ferrotorch/tokenizer-parity-v1 (bundle.tar SHA-256 8d949235bb5cfaaea8916dcce001d17fd4b4383c2d5e033272397cf9545d1ef6); registry entry added. 5/5 families PASS via both the python verifier (real HF download round-trip) and the cargo --ignored test. Evidence: cargo test -p ferrotorch-tokenize --lib = 15 passed; cargo build --workspace = clean; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings = clean; cargo fmt --check = clean. No tolerance loosening (exact integer/string match throughout). Real bug surfaced and architected through: initial naive use of transformers.AutoTokenizer as the python reference produced FAILs on llama3 (clean_up_tokenization_spaces) and clip (slow-tokenizer </w> stripping); the architecturally correct reference is tokenizers.Tokenizer (the exact library rust wraps) — fixed and documented in registry.rs + script docstrings.
